summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Music Bingo app. Backend APIs working excellently (94.7% success rate), frontend functionality fully operational including lobby, custom setup wizard, host dashboard, and audience view. WebSocket real-time updates functioning correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: Expects query parameter instead of JSON body
minor_bugs.impact: Volume setting API call format incorrect

passed_tests: Lobby page loads with Quick Play and Custom Setup cards
Quick Play mode creates game and navigates to Host Dashboard
Custom Setup wizard displays all 4 steps (Game Type, Round Type, Call Interval, Music Decade)
Host Dashboard loads with video drop zone, timer, controls
Game creation via /api/game/create endpoint (both preset and custom modes)
Audience View button opens new window
Bingo board display with called numbers
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix volume API endpoint to accept JSON body instead of query parameter. Minor issue - app is fully functional otherwise.
